compiled_state.title: [ticket-platform-compat/write_commit_event]: git rev-parse fails in Alpine Docker -> ticket_create returns empty
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-ticket-platform-compat.sh B and C sections fail in alpine-busybox CI leg.
ticket_create returns empty ID. All ticket creation calls fail. Section A passes.

## Error
FAIL: created ticket for B1 (expected: non-empty, actual: empty)
FAIL: flock fallback: ticket_create returned id (expected: non-empty, actual: empty)

## Context
Pre-existing on main since at least 2026-04-25. Blocking PR #11 merge.
Previous fix (65d6c900dc) added GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM to test scripts but not to ticket-lib.sh write_commit_event itself.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 6 (ADVANCED) — severity=2 (CI blocks PR merge), complexity=1 (non-obvious cross-layer: ticket-lib.sh+subshell+set -euo pipefail), environment=1 (CI Alpine Docker only), intermittent=0 (deterministic), prior-fix-attempts=+2 (65d6c900dc partially addressed env var but not in library function). Root cause hypothesis: write_commit_event calls git rev-parse --show-toplevel unconditionally without GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1; fails in Alpine Docker volume mount; set -euo pipefail in ticket_create subshell propagates exit silently.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix implemented: made git rev-parse --show-toplevel conditional on TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR not being set and added GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1 in write_commit_event, _python_write_commit_event, _tag_add, _tag_remove, _write_preconditions, _read_latest_preconditions, and ticket_read_status. Tests pass: test-ticket-platform-compat.sh PASSED 18/18, test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh PASSED 13/13.
comments.author: Test
